<!--
Title: Mobile Menu
Type: elementor_snippet
Author: Hunter
Last edited: 2026-05-12 14:13:15
--- The comment is visible only for administrators ---
-->
<style>
.mobile-main-menu h2{
font-size: 28px !important;
}
.mobile-main-menu {
margin-top: 50px;
}
.mobile-main-menu h2 a:after {
content: "";
background: url(/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/arrow-right.svg);
position: absolute;
width: 24px;
height: 23px;
top: 9px;
background-size: contain;
background-repeat: no-repeat;
margin-left: 10px !important;
}

.submenu {
position: absolute;
top: 85px;
left: 0;
width: 100%;
min-height: 100%;
background: #fff;
z-index: 999;
transform: translateX(-100%);
transition: transform 0.35s ease;
padding: 20px;
}

.submenu.active {
transform: translateX(0%);
}

.back-btn {
cursor: pointer;
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
.elementor-sticky--active img {
width: 140px !important;
}
.elementor-sticky--active .elementor-widget-image{
margin-top: 0px !important;
}
}
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {

const submenuButtons = document.querySelectorAll(".open-submenu");
const backButtons = document.querySelectorAll(".back-btn");

submenuButtons.forEach(btn => {
btn.addEventListener("click", function () {
const target = this.getAttribute("data-target");
const submenu = document.getElementById(target);
if (!submenu) return;
submenu.classList.add("active");
});
});

backButtons.forEach(back => {
back.addEventListener("click", function () {
const submenu = this.closest(".submenu");
submenu.classList.remove("active");
});
});

});

</script>

<!-- End of snippet -->

-->

</script>

<!-- End of snippet -->
<style>
.e-con.e-parent:nth-of-type(n+4):not(.e-lazyloaded):not(.e-no-lazyload),
.e-con.e-parent:nth-of-type(n+4):not(.e-lazyloaded):not(.e-no-lazyload) * {
background-image: none !important;
}
@media screen and (max-height: 1024px) {
.e-con.e-parent:nth-of-type(n+3):not(.e-lazyloaded):not(.e-no-lazyload),
.e-con.e-parent:nth-of-type(n+3):not(.e-lazyloaded):not(.e-no-lazyload) * {
background-image: none !important;
}
}
@media screen and (max-height: 640px) {
.e-con.e-parent:nth-of-type(n+2):not(.e-lazyloaded):not(.e-no-lazyload),
.e-con.e-parent:nth-of-type(n+2):not(.e-lazyloaded):not(.e-no-lazyload) * {
background-image: none !important;
}
}
</style>
<link rel="icon" href="https://roguepest.savagestrategic.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/cropped-favicon-32x32.jpg" sizes="32x32" />
<link rel="icon" href="https://roguepest.savagestrategic.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/cropped-favicon-192x192.jpg" sizes="192x192" />
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="https://roguepest.savagestrategic.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/cropped-favicon-180x180.jpg" />
<meta name="msapplication-TileImage" content="https://roguepest.savagestrategic.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/cropped-favicon-270x270.jpg" />
<style id="wp-custom-css">
html,body{
overflow-x: hidden !important;
}
.btn-link a{
border-radius: 0px !important;
}
.elementor-widget-text-editor a:not(footer a), label a {
text-decoration: underline !important;
}
/* body:not(.home) .hero-section .e-con-inner > .e-con-full {
padding-top: 180px;
} */
.elementor-sticky--active .logo img{
width: 170px !important;
}
.logo img {
width: 200px;
object-fit: contain;
object-position: left;
}
.sub-heading{
font-family: "Barlow", Sans-serif;
text-transform:uppercase;
}
.logo img{
transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out;
}
/* .elementor-sticky--active .logo{
margin:-35px 0px calc(var(--kit-widget-spacing, 0px) + -56px) 0px !important;
} */

/* .parent-section {
border-radius: 16px !important;
} */
/* body {
margin: 8px;
} */
h1,h2,h3,h4{
text-transform: unset !important;
}
.dark-form .round-checkbox-ui {
border: 2px solid #ffffff;
}
span.elementor-field-option.round-init {
display: flex !important;
gap: 10px;
}
.unfold, .unfold1 {
height: 230px;
overflow: hidden;
}
.fold-btn, .fold-btn1 {
cursor: pointer;
user-select: none;
}
.process-section, .hero-section{
overflow: hidden;
}
#form-field-global_footer_quote, #form-field-home_hero_quote, #form-field-svc_sidebar, #form-field-contact_main_form{
display: none;
}
.spin-slow img{
animation: slowSpin 20s linear infinite;
}
header img{
transition: height 0.3s ease-in-out;
}
.inline-form .elementor-field-group-phone_number:after {
top: 13px;
left: 15px;
}
.inline-form #form-field-phone_number {
padding-left: 30px !important;
}
.desktop .elementor-sticky--effects img {
height: 48px !important;
}
select#form-field-concern{
padding-left: 15px !important;
}
@keyframes slowSpin {
from {
transform: rotate(0deg);
}
to {
transform: rotate(360deg);
}
}
.home-services-tab h2{
font-size: 30px;
}
body .ti-widget.ti-goog .ti-controls .ti-next:hover, body .ti-widget.ti-goog .ti-controls .ti-next:focus, body .ti-widget.ti-goog .ti-controls .ti-prev:hover, body .ti-widget.ti-goog .ti-controls .ti-prev:focus{
background-color: var(--e-global-color-accent) !important;
}

.parent-section {
padding-left: 70px;
padding-right: 70px;
}
.mega-menu-sub h3{
font-family: "Prompt", Sans-serif !important;
text-transform: capitalize !important;
font-size: 16px !important;
font-weight: 400 !important;
}
.e-n-menu-content > div {
max-height: 0;
opacity: 0;
overflow: hidden;
transition: max-height 0.9s ease, opacity 0.25s ease;
}
.e-n-menu-content.e-active > div {
max-height: 999px;
opacity: 1;
}
/* .mega-menu-sub:before {
content: "";
background: url(/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/leaf-1.svg);
position: absolute;
width: 24px;
height: 23px;
top: -2px;
left: 0;
background-size: contain;
background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
.mega-menu-sub {
padding-left: 35px;
} */
.elementor-swiper-button {
border: solid 1px var(--e-global-color-accent) !important;
}
.elementor-counter-title {
text-align: center;
margin-top: 15px !important;
line-height: 1.4em;
}
.btn-big-text .elementor-animation-grow:hover {
transform: scale(1.03);
}
.dark-form label a {
color: #fff;
text-decoration: underline;
}

.sub-menu.e-flex {
margin-top: -5px;
}

.elementor-field-group-phone_number:after {
content: "+1";
position: absolute;
left: 44px;
top: 32px;
color: #717171;
}
/* Round checkbox base */
.round-checkbox-ui {
width: 24px;
min-width: 24px;
height: 24px;
border: 2px solid var(--e-global-color-accent);
border-radius: 50%;
display: inline-flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
margin-right: 0px;
cursor: pointer;
box-sizing: border-box;
margin-bottom: -3px;
}

/* Checkmark */
.round-checkbox-ui::after {
content: '✓';
font-size: 12px;
color: #fff;
line-height: 1;
opacity: 0;
transform: scale(0.5);
transition: all 0.15s ease;
}

/* Checked state */
.round-checkbox-ui.checked {
background-color: var(--e-global-color-accent);
}

.round-checkbox-ui.checked::after {
opacity: 1;
transform: scale(1);
}
#form-field-phone_number {
padding-left: 56px !important;
}
.wp-element-button {
background: #4D9100;
color: #fff !important;
margin-top: 20px;
border-radius: 8px 8px 8px 8px;
padding: 12px 18px 12px 18px;
font-weight: 600;
}

.elementor-button, .wp-element-button {
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/btn-bg-1.webp);
background-size: contain;
}
.slick-dots li button{
font-size: 0px !important;
}
.slick-dots li button:hover {
background: transparent;
}
p {
margin-block-end: 0;
}
body .ti-widget.ti-goog .ti-reviews-container-wrapper {
margin: 0 !important;
}
.past-work-section .elementor-swiper-button {
border: solid 1px;
}
.ti-controls div {
display: block !important;
}

.sidebar-nav .elementor-button {
background-image: none;
border: solid 1px !important;
}
.no-bg .elementor-button {
background-image: none;
}
svg.e-font-icon-svg.e-fab-linkedin {
width: 16px;
}
.section-service-area .elementor-button {
background: #FFFF00 !important;
}
h2 span {
color: var(--e-global-color-accent);
}
.section-service-area span.elementor-button-icon {
margin-top: 0;
border-radius: 50% !important;
overflow: hidden;
}
.sidebar-nav .active .elementor-button {
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/side-bg.png);
background-size: contain;
}
.elementor-field-group-terms label {
font-size: 12px;
}
.home-reviews .ti-widget.ti-goog:not(.ti-no-profile-img) .ti-review-header .ti-platform-icon {
top: unset;
bottom: 6px;
left: 24px;
}
#home-reviews .ti-inner {
display: flex !important;
flex-direction: column;
background-color: #fff !important;
}
.ti-review-header {
order: 3;
margin-top: 20px;
}
span.ti-verified-review.ti-verified-platform {
display: none !important;
}
.home-reviews .ti-widget.ti-goog .ti-review-header .ti-profile-img {
margin-top: 0px !important;
margin-bottom: 15px !important;
}
.review-section {
width: 440px;
margin-top:15px;
}
a.ti-header.ti-header-grid.source-Google {
padding: 0 !important;
}
.marquee-content span.grad-text {
font-style: italic;
font-size: 16px;
font-weight: 600;
font-family: var(--e-global-typography-text-font-family);
color: #3B7503;
margin-left: 10px;
text-transform: uppercase;
}
.review-section a{
color: #292829;
font-weight: 500;
text-decoration: underline;
display: block;
text-transform: capitalize;
}
html, body{
overflow-x: hidden;
}
.elementor-field-group{
position: relative;
}
.elementor-icon {
font-size: 40px;
}
.elementor-field-group input, .elementor-select-wrapper select{
background-color: #ffffff;
border-color: #042B5433 !important;
border-radius: 5px 5px 5px 5px;
border: 1px solid;
padding-right: 10px !important;
}
.dark .elementor-field-group:before {
left: 18px;
top: 50px;
}
span.elementor-field-option {
margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.dark .elementor-field-group-phone_number:after {
left: 44px;
top: 38px;
color: #fff;
}
.dark .elementor-field-group-howcanhelp label {
font-size: 16px !important;
}
.elementor-field-group:before {
content: "";
width: 15px;
height: 15px;
position: absolute;
z-index: 3;
left: 18px;
top: 50%;
transform: translate(0, -50%);
background-repeat: no-repeat;
background-size: contain;
}
.elementor-field-group-f_name:before , .elementor-field-group-l_name:before {
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/user.svg);
}
.elementor-field-group-email_address:before {
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/email.svg);
}
.elementor-field-group-phone_number:before {
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/phone.svg);
}
.elementor-field-group-location:before{
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/map.svg);
}


.check-icon .elementor-icon svg {
border-radius: 50%;
}
.orange-color, .elementor-counter .elementor-counter-number-suffix {
color: var(--e-global-color-accent) !important;
}
.elementor-field-option label {
font-size: 10px !important;
line-height: 14px !important;
display: inline !important;
}
span.elementor-field-option {
line-height: 12px;
}
span.elementor-field-option {
display: inline-block !important;
}

input#form-field-terms {
margin-top: 2px;
}
.swiper-pagination {
width: unset !important;
bottom: -6px !important;
}
.swiper-pagination {
position: absolute;
text-align: center;
transition: .3s opacity;
transform: translate3d(0,0,0);
z-index: 10;
}
.elementor-swiper-button-prev {
top: unset !important;
bottom: -45px;
left: unset !important;
right: 60px;
}
.elementor-swiper-button {
padding: 12px;
border: solid 1px white;
position: relative;
transition: all 0.3s;
border-radius: 50%;
}
.elementor-swiper-button-next {
top: unset !important;
bottom: -45px;
}
.outer-marquee {
overflow: hidden !important;
}
.outer-marquee div {
display: inline-flex;
gap: 20px;
}
.outer-marquee div {
display: inline-flex;
gap: 20px;
}
.marquee-loop {
white-space: nowrap;
animation: loop-anim 80s linear infinite;
}
.marquee-content {
text-align: center;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
flex-direction: row;
}
.sidebar-nav{
padding: 20px 40px;
margin-left: 20px;
position: relative;
}
.sidebar-nav:before {
content: "";
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
background: #D6D6D6;
width: 3px;
}
details {
background: #F8F8F8;
margin-bottom: 20px !important;
border: 1px solid #00000014 !important;
border-radius: 4px;
padding-top: 24px;
padding-bottom: 24px;
padding-left: 24px;
padding-right: 24px;
}
details> div {
padding: 0 !important;
padding-top: 24px !important;
}
summary.e-n-accordion-item-title {
padding: 0 !important;

}
.process-section .white .elementor-icon-box-title:before {
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Progress-container.png);
}
.process-section .elementor-icon-box-title {
margin-top: 50px;
}
.process-section .elementor-icon-box-description {
padding-right: 20px;
padding-left: 20px;
}
.process-section .elementor-icon-box-title:before {
content: "";
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Progress-container.png);
position: absolute;
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
left: 0;
top: 108px;
background-size: contain;
background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
.sidebar-nav a.elementor-button:after{
content: none;
}
.sidebar-nav a{
overflow: unset !important;
position: unset;
}
.past-work-section img{
height: 350px;
object-fit:cover;
width: 100%;
}
.sidebar-nav a.elementor-button:before {
content: "";
position: absolute !important;
background: url(/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/cropped-favicon.jpg) !important;
width: 34px;
height: 28px;
left: -53px;
top: 50%;
background-position: center;
background-size: contain !important;
background-repeat: no-repeat !important;
transform: translate(0, -50%);
z-index: 9 !important;
opacity: 1;
background-color: #fff !important;
}
@keyframes loop-anim {
0% {
margin-left: 0;
}

100% {
margin-left: -50%;
}
}


.services-detail {
display: none;
}
.services-detail.active {
display: block;
}
.services-btn.active a {
background: var(--e-global-color-accent) !important;
color: #fff !important;
}
a.elementor-button{
overflow: hidden;
position: relative;
}
span.elementor-button-icon {
margin-top: 3px;
}

/* .ti-widget-container {
padding: 0 !important;
margin: 0 !important;
} */
.phone-btn span.elementor-button-icon {
margin-top: 1px;
}
.ti-reviews-container-wrapper {
margin-top: 0 !important;
padding-top: 0px !important;
}
.ti-controls div{
border: solid 2px var(--e-global-color-accent);
}
body .ti-widget .ti-controls .ti-prev {
right: 60px !important;
left: auto !important;
}
.ti-controls {
top: unset !important;
bottom: -10px !important;
}
.ti-reviews-container-wrapper {
margin-top: 0 !important;
padding-top: 0px !important;
}
.ti-controls {
top: unset !important;
bottom: -10px !important;
}
/* .ti-next:before {
content: "";
background-image: url("/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/right.svg");
}
.ti-prev:before {
content: "";
background-image: url("/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/left-1.svg");
} */
.ti-next:hover:before, body .ti-widget.ti-goog .ti-controls .ti-next:hover:before, body .ti-widget.ti-goog .ti-controls .ti-next:focus:before{
content: "";
background-image: url("/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/arrow-w.png");
}
body .ti-widget[data-layout-id='4'][data-set-id='light-background'] .ti-controls .ti-next:hover, body .ti-widget[data-layout-id='4'][data-set-id='light-background'] .ti-controls .ti-next:focus, body .ti-widget[data-layout-id='4'][data-set-id='light-background'] .ti-controls .ti-prev:hover, body .ti-widget[data-layout-id='4'][data-set-id='light-background'] .ti-controls .ti-prev:focus{
background-color: var(--e-global-color-accent) !important;
}
body .ti-widget .ti-controls .ti-prev:hover:before, body .ti-widget .ti-controls .ti-prev:focus:before {
content: "";
background-image: url("/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/arrow-w-1-e1762351380716.png");

}
.ti-widget .ti-controls .ti-next, .ti-widget .ti-controls .ti-prev {
width: 45px;
height: 45px;
}
.ti-controls div:before{
border-color: var(--e-global-color-accent) !important;
}
/* .ti-controls div:before {
outline: 0 !important;
width: 17px !important;
height: 17px !important;
background-position: center;
background-size: contain;
background-repeat: no-repeat;
border-bottom-width: 0 !important;
border-left-width: 0 !important;
transform: none !important;
top: 12px !important;
left: 12px !important;
} */
body .ti-widget .ti-controls .ti-prev {
right: 60px !important;
left: auto;
}
body .ti-widget .ti-controls .ti-next:hover, body .ti-widget .ti-controls .ti-prev:hover {
background-color: var(--e-global-color-accent) !important;
}
.ti-widget .ti-controls .ti-next, .ti-widget .ti-controls .ti-prev {
width: 45px !important;
height: 45px !important;
outline: none !important;
}
.ti-widget .ti-controls .ti-next, .ti-widget .ti-controls .ti-prev {
border-radius: 33px !important;
padding: 10px !important;
}
.ti-load-more-reviews-container {
display: none !important;
}

.logo-carousel img {
height: 70px;
width: auto !important;
object-fit: contain;
}
.elementor-swiper-button:hover {
background: #4D9100 !important;
}
.elementor-swiper-button:hover path{
fill: #fff !important;
}
ul.sub-menu {
padding-left: 20px;
}
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
.parent-section {
padding-left: 20px;
padding-right: 20px;
}
}
@media (max-width: 767px) {
.service-49 span.elementor-icon-list-text {
line-height: 26px !important;
text-align: left;
}
.facebook-review p.elementor-icon-box-description span {
margin-top: 5px !important;
}
body:not(.home) .hero-section .e-con-inner > .e-con-full:last-child {
margin-top: -35px;
}
.ti-widget[data-layout-id='4'][data-set-id='light-background'] .ti-controls {
display: block !important;
}
.service-49 .elementor-inline-items {
justify-content: left !important;
}
.service-49 .e-con-inner {
padding-bottom: 50px;
}
.service-49 .elementor-inline-item {
align-items: start !important;
}
.service-49 span.elementor-icon-list-icon {
margin-top: 6px;
}
.service-49 li.elementor-icon-list-item {
margin-bottom: 10px !important;
}
/* body:not(.home) .hero-section .e-con-inner > .e-con-full {
padding-top: 100px;
} */
.hero-section .elementor-spacer-inner {
height: 200px !important;
}

.btn-big-text .elementor-button {
padding: 14px 10px 14px 10px !important;
font-size: 15px;
}
.parent-section.no-mobile-padding{
padding: 0px !important;
}
.parent-section {
padding-left: 10px;
padding-right: 10px;
}
.swiper-pagination {
display: none;
}
.hero-section.parent-section {
padding-left: 0px;
padding-right: 0px;
}
.review-section {
width: 100%;
min-width: 200px;
}

.services-title-area .header-image img {
height: 300px !important;
}
.review-section p a {
font-size: 14px;
margin-top: 2px;
}
.review-section .elementor-icon-box-content {
padding-left: 10px;
padding-right: 10px;
}
.review-section .elementor-icon-box-icon {
padding-left: 10px;
}
.review-section p {
line-height: 15px;
}
.section-service-area span.elementor-button-text {
font-size: 13px;
}
.section-service-area .elementor-button-icon{
font-size: 14px;
}
.section-service-area .elementor-button{
padding: 10px 14px 10px 14px;
}
.no-absolute-mobile {
position: relative !important;
width: 100% !important;
margin-top: 40px;
}
.review-section p.elementor-icon-box-description span {
display: flex;
}
.elementor-counter-title {
line-height: 1.4em !important;
text-align: center;
}
.services-details-wrapper h3 {
font-size: 24px !important;
/* text-align: center; */
}
.services-details-wrapper .elementor-widget-text-editor{
/* text-align: justify !important; */
}
.check-icon .elementor-widget-text-editor, .check-icon h4 {
text-align: center !important;
}
.sidebar-nav:before {
content: none;
}
.sidebar-nav a.elementor-button:before {
content: none
}
.sidebar-nav {
padding: 0;
margin-left: 0;
}
.sidebar-nav .elementor-button {
padding: 10px 10px 10px 10px !important;
font-size: 14px !important;
}
.sidebar-nav .elementor-button {
width: auto !important;
min-width: auto !important;
}
.sidebar-nav .elementor-widget-button{
min-width: auto !important;
padding-top: 5px;
padding-bottom: 5px;
}
.ti-widget.ti-goog .ti-controls {
display: block !important;
}
.sidebar-nav{
overflow-x: scroll;
overflow-y: hidden;
}
.sidebar-nav .elementor-button{
flex: 0 0 auto;
white-space: nowrap;
}
.section-service-area .elementor-button {
padding: 10px 10px 10px 10px !important;
}
.offcanvas-open{
overflow: hidden;
height: 100vh;
}
}
</style>
</head>
<body class="home wp-singular page-template-default page page-id-2 logged-in admin-bar no-customize-support wp-embed-responsive wp-theme-hello-elementor wp-child-theme-roguepest hello-elementor-default elementor-default elementor-kit-10 elementor-page elementor-page-2">

<script>
(function() {
var request, b = document.body, c = 'className', cs = 'customize-support', rcs = new RegExp('(^|\\s+)(no-)?'+cs+'(\\s+|$)');

request = true;
b[c] = b[c].replace( rcs, ' ' );
// The customizer requires postMessage and CORS (if the site is cross domain).
b[c] += ( window.postMessage && request ? ' ' : ' no-' ) + cs;
}());
//# sourceURL=wp_customize_support_script
</script>

<div data-elementor-type="wp-page" data-elementor-id="2" class="elementor elementor-2" data-elementor-post-type="page">
<section class="elementor-element elementor-element-6c4215a hero-section parent-section e-flex e-con-boxed e-con e-parent" data-id="6c4215a" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{&quot;background_background&quot;:&quot;classic&quot;}">
<div class="e-con-inner">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-4d66501 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="4d66501" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-ecf6fc1 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="ecf6fc1" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h1 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Your Guard Against Pests in Alabama!</h1> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-79a0a0a elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="79a0a0a" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
<p>Rogue Pest Solutions delivers expert pest, termite, and mosquito control across Greater Birmingham, Huntsville, Rainbow City, Cullman, and Foley, AL. We&#8217;re here to protect your homes and businesses.</p> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-9ab3809 elementor-icon-list--layout-inline elementor-mobile-align-center elementor-list-item-link-full_width elementor-widget elementor-widget-icon-list" data-id="9ab3809" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="icon-list.default">

<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-05d4c72 parent-section e-flex e-con-boxed e-con e-parent" data-id="05d4c72" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{&quot;background_background&quot;:&quot;classic&quot;}">
<div class="e-con-inner">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-0389867 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="0389867" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-d13fa82 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="d13fa82" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-0eb9908 elementor-widget elementor-widget-image" data-id="0eb9908" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="image.default">
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="960" height="640" src="https://roguepest.savagestrategic.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/img-1.webp" class="attachment-full size-full wp-image-1423" alt="Residential neighborhood with homes and traffic on a city road" srcset="https://roguepest.savagestrategic.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/img-1.webp 960w, https://roguepest.savagestrategic.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/img-1-300x200.webp 300w, https://roguepest.savagestrategic.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/img-1-768x512.webp 768w" sizes="(max-width: 960px) 100vw, 960px" /> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-096c88a e-con-full elementor-hidden-desktop elementor-hidden-tablet elementor-hidden-mobile e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="096c88a" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{&quot;background_background&quot;:&quot;classic&quot;,&quot;position&quot;:&quot;absolute&quot;}">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-4b7f253 elementor-widget__width-initial elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="4b7f253" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Rogue Pest Solutions</h3> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-40cecc0 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="40cecc0" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Founder, CEO </div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-aaab71e e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="aaab71e" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-9a4c0a8 sub-heading elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="9a4c0a8" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<div class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Who we are</div> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-593a809 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="593a809" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Our Story</h2> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-41187ae elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="41187ae" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Rogue Pest Solutions is your trusted partner in effective and eco-friendly pest management in Alabama. Specializing in residential and commercial pest control, we expertly handle ants, termites, mosquitoes, and more. Our team, equipped with the latest technology and environmentally responsible techniques, ensures your property remains pest-free. Experience prompt, professional service with a customer-centric approach. Contact us for a pest-free peace of mind! </div>

<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-11e8860 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="11e8860" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">General Pest Control Solutions</h2> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-7f14d40 elementor-widget__width-inherit elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="7f14d40" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Protect your Birmingham home and family from common Alabama pests with Rogue Pest Solution&#8217;s reliable services. </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-f3268af elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="f3268af" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Comprehensive Pest Control Services for Your Home</h3> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-b97d989 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="b97d989" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
At Rogue Pest Solutions, we take a comprehensive approach to general pest control. Our team of experts conducts thorough inspections to identify pests and their hiding spots. We eliminate all common Alabama pests and protect your home or business from infestations. </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-98a2476 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="98a2476" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Thorough Pest Control Services for a Pest-Free Home</h3> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-514cd8b elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="514cd8b" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
At Rogue Pest Solutions, we understand the importance of a pest-free home in Alabama. Our expert team is dedicated to eliminating common pests like roaches and rodents, providing a thorough and effective pest control service that ensures the safety and comfort of your family. </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-3a2e51b elementor-icon-list--layout-traditional elementor-list-item-link-full_width elementor-widget elementor-widget-icon-list" data-id="3a2e51b" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="icon-list.default">
<ul class="elementor-icon-list-items">
<li class="elementor-icon-list-item">
<span class="elementor-icon-list-text"><strong>Elimination Process:</strong> Our pest control process involves a comprehensive inspection, targeted treatments, and ongoing prevention measures.</span>
</li>
<li class="elementor-icon-list-item">
<span class="elementor-icon-list-text"><strong>Detailed Inspections:</strong> We conduct detailed inspections to identify pest hiding spots and assess the extent of infestation.</span>
</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-678ccd4 e-con-full check-icon e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="678ccd4" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{&quot;background_background&quot;:&quot;classic&quot;}">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-c74effb elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="c74effb" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Contact Rogue Pest Solutions Today</h4> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-bd6e444 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="bd6e444" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
<p>If you&#8217;re facing pest issues in your Alabama home, don&#8217;t wait for the problem to worsen. Contact Rogue Pest Solutions at <a class="navbar1_link location_tag w-nav-link" href="tel:866-370-7378">866-370-7378</a> for expert residential pest control services. Our team is ready to inspect your property, provide tailored solutions, and help you maintain a pest-free home. Call today to schedule your appointment!</p> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-de151d3 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="de151d3" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-03668da elementor-widget__width-initial elementor-align-right phone-btn elementor-widget elementor-widget-button" data-id="03668da" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="button.default">

<span class="elementor-button-text">866-370-7378</span>
</span>
</a>
</div>

<span class="elementor-button-content-wrapper">
<span class="elementor-button-text">Learn More</span>
</span>
</a>

</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1d37fc9 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="1d37fc9" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Effective Mosquito Control</h2> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-c3a865b elementor-widget__width-inherit elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="c3a865b" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Keep your outdoor spaces mosquito-free with Rogue Pest Solution&#8217;s professional mosquito services! </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-90dcb32 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="90dcb32" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Say Goodbye to Mosquitoes with Rogue Pest Solutions!</h3> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-6783650 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="6783650" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Our mosquito control service is designed to eliminate breeding grounds and prevent infestations in Alabama homes and businesses. With targeted insecticides and expert techniques, we ensure your property is mosquito-free. </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-0aeee07 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="0aeee07" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Enjoy a Mosquito-Free Outdoor Experience
</h3> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-47081ec elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="47081ec" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Rogue&#8217;s mosquito control service eliminates mosquitoes, creating a safe and enjoyable outdoor environment. Say goodbye to itchy bites and protect your family from mosquito-borne diseases. </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-eb07d2d elementor-icon-list--layout-traditional elementor-list-item-link-full_width elementor-widget elementor-widget-icon-list" data-id="eb07d2d" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="icon-list.default">
<ul class="elementor-icon-list-items">
<li class="elementor-icon-list-item">
<span class="elementor-icon-list-text"><strong> Safe:</strong> Our mosquito control treatments are safe for your family and pets, while effectively eliminating mosquitoes.</span>
</li>
<li class="elementor-icon-list-item">
<span class="elementor-icon-list-text"><strong> Efficient:</strong> Our team ensures efficient mosquito control by targeting breeding grounds and applying effective insecticides.</span>
</li>
</ul>
</div>

<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Contact Rogue Pest Solutions Today</h4> </div>

<p>If you&#8217;re facing pest issues in your Alabama home, don&#8217;t wait for the problem to worsen. Contact Rogue Pest Solutions at <a class="navbar1_link location_tag w-nav-link" href="tel:866-370-7378">866-370-7378</a> for expert residential pest control services. Our team is ready to inspect your property, provide tailored solutions, and help you maintain a pest-free home. Call today to schedule your appointment!</p> </div>

<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5594e31 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="5594e31" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Protection from Termites</h2> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-45d318c elementor-widget__width-inherit elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="45d318c" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Safeguard your investment from termites with Rogue Pest Solutions and Sentricon. </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-c251522 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="c251522" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Comprehensive Termite Control Solutions for Your Home</h3> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-bcace88 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="bcace88" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Termites in Alabama can cause extensive damage to your home or business, compromising its structural integrity. Without professional termite control, you run the risk of costly repairs and potential safety hazards. Protect your investment and ensure peace of mind with Rogue Pest Solution&#8217;s expert termite control services. </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-f91c83f elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="f91c83f" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Protect Your Home or Business with the Sentricon Always Active Baiting System</h3> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-9a0b052 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="9a0b052" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Introducing the premier solution for termite protection &#8211; the Sentricon Always Active Baiting System. Say goodbye to termite damage and keep your Alabama home or business safe. </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-e9fb728 elementor-icon-list--layout-traditional elementor-list-item-link-full_width elementor-widget elementor-widget-icon-list" data-id="e9fb728" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="icon-list.default">
<ul class="elementor-icon-list-items">
<li class="elementor-icon-list-item">
<span class="elementor-icon-list-text"><strong>Effective Solution:</strong> The Sentricon Always Active Baiting System is a proven and effective solution for termite control.</span>
</li>
<li class="elementor-icon-list-item">
<span class="elementor-icon-list-text"><strong>Long-lasting:</strong> With the Sentricon system, you can enjoy long-lasting protection against termite infestations.</span>
</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="elementor-icon-box-content">

<h3 class="elementor-icon-box-title">
<span >
Review &amp; Approve Your Quote </span>
</h3>
<p class="elementor-icon-box-description">
Carefully review your customized estimate and approve it with one simple click to move forward with your pest treatment plan. </p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2b49762f elementor-view-stacked elementor-shape-circle elementor-position-block-start elementor-mobile-position-block-start elementor-widget elementor-widget-icon-box" data-id="2b49762f" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="icon-box.default">

<h3 class="elementor-icon-box-title">
<span >
Schedule Your Service </span>
</h3>
<p class="elementor-icon-box-description">
Choose a convenient appointment time, and our team will confirm your visit and prepare for your inspection or treatment service. </p>
</div>

</div>
<div class="elementor-icon-box-content">

<h3 class="elementor-icon-box-title">
<span >
Enjoy a Pest-Free Property </span>
</h3>
<p class="elementor-icon-box-description">
Relax while our experienced technicians handle the hard work, helping keep your home or business protected from unwanted pests year-round. </p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-7d4ea3e1 elementor-widget__width-initial elementor-align-center phone-btn elementor-widget elementor-widget-button" data-id="7d4ea3e1" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="button.default">
<a class="elementor-button elementor-button-link elementor-size-sm elementor-animation-grow" href="tel:8663707378">
<span class="elementor-button-content-wrapper">
<span class="elementor-button-icon">
<svg aria-hidden="true" class="e-font-icon-svg e-fas-phone-alt" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M497.39 361.8l-112-48a24 24 0 0 0-28 6.9l-49.6 60.6A370.66 370.66 0 0 1 130.6 204.11l60.6-49.6a23.94 23.94 0 0 0 6.9-28l-48-112A24.16 24.16 0 0 0 122.6.61l-104 24A24 24 0 0 0 0 48c0 256.5 207.9 464 464 464a24 24 0 0 0 23.4-18.6l24-104a24.29 24.29 0 0 0-14.01-27.6z"></path></svg> </span>
<span class="elementor-button-text">866-370-7378</span>
</span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="elementor-element elementor-element-59f2ff6 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-parent" data-id="59f2ff6" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-0d1a918 elementor-widget elementor-widget-template" data-id="0d1a918" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="template.default">
<div class="elementor-widget-container">
<div class="elementor-template">
<div data-elementor-type="container" data-elementor-id="186" class="elementor elementor-186" data-elementor-post-type="elementor_library">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-6177e197 parent-section e-flex e-con-boxed e-con e-parent" data-id="6177e197" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="e-con-inner">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2554f811 sub-heading elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="2554f811" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<div class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Dedicated to Quality Service and Community Engagement
</div> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5a10ce92 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="5a10ce92" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Why Birmingham, Alabama Homeowners Choose Us</h2> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2cb36108 elementor-widget__width-initial elementor-widget-mobile__width-auto elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="2cb36108" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Rogue Pest Solutions isn’t just about pest control; we&#8217;re committed to making a positive impact in the communities we serve throughout Alabama. </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-19475d33 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="19475d33" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-7896ea67 elementor-widget__width-initial elementor-absolute no-absolute-mobile elementor-widget elementor-widget-image" data-id="7896ea67" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;_position&quot;:&quot;absolute&quot;}" data-widget_type="image.default">
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="800" height="607" src="https://roguepest.savagestrategic.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/656941d9f25e72003310e747_blake-wheeler-zBHU08hdzhY-unsplash-p-3200.webp" class="attachment-large size-large wp-image-490" alt="Aerial view of a residential town with homes and roads" srcset="https://roguepest.savagestrategic.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/656941d9f25e72003310e747_blake-wheeler-zBHU08hdzhY-unsplash-p-3200.webp 800w, https://roguepest.savagestrategic.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/656941d9f25e72003310e747_blake-wheeler-zBHU08hdzhY-unsplash-p-3200-300x228.webp 300w, https://roguepest.savagestrategic.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/656941d9f25e72003310e747_blake-wheeler-zBHU08hdzhY-unsplash-p-3200-768x583.webp 768w" sizes="(max-width: 800px) 100vw, 800px" /> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-720d5f0e e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="720d5f0e" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{&quot;background_background&quot;:&quot;classic&quot;}">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-71e667d6 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="71e667d6" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{&quot;background_background&quot;:&quot;classic&quot;}">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-35d096ad e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="35d096ad" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-3c222c8e elementor-widget elementor-widget-icon-box" data-id="3c222c8e" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="icon-box.default">
<div class="elementor-icon-box-wrapper">

<div class="elementor-icon-box-content">

<h3 class="elementor-icon-box-title">
<span >
Commitment to Excellence </span>
</h3>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-17ec4ae6 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="17ec4ae6" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Our team is dedicated to providing the highest quality of service, ensuring effective and lasting pest control solutions for every client.

</div>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-166137f1 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="166137f1" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-c89609b elementor-widget elementor-widget-icon-box" data-id="c89609b" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="icon-box.default">
<div class="elementor-icon-box-wrapper">

<div class="elementor-icon-box-content">

<h3 class="elementor-icon-box-title">
<span >
Community Involvement </span>
</h3>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-4d29e1d8 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="4d29e1d8" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Beyond pest control, we actively participate in community initiatives and support local causes in Cullman, Foley, Gadsden, Birmingham and Huntsville, Alabama.

</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-0d5cfd7 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="0d5cfd7" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{&quot;background_background&quot;:&quot;classic&quot;}">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-6b1128a e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="6b1128a" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-ba20e5b elementor-widget elementor-widget-icon-box" data-id="ba20e5b" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="icon-box.default">
<div class="elementor-icon-box-wrapper">

<div class="elementor-icon-box-content">

<h3 class="elementor-icon-box-title">
<span >
Fast, Reliable Local Response </span>
</h3>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1bce5d5 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="1bce5d5" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
We know pest issues can’t wait. Our team responds quickly with flexible scheduling and prompt service to restore comfort and peace of mind to your home. </div>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a3823d6 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="a3823d6" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-0861030 elementor-widget elementor-widget-icon-box" data-id="0861030" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="icon-box.default">
<div class="elementor-icon-box-wrapper">

<div class="elementor-icon-box-content">

<h3 class="elementor-icon-box-title">
<span >
Safe &amp; Family-Friendly Treatments </span>
</h3>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1b41a2b elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="1b41a2b" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Your safety comes first. We use carefully selected products and methods that are effective against pests while being safe for your family and pets. </div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-633afe17 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="633afe17" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{&quot;background_background&quot;:&quot;classic&quot;}">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-64e4e427 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="64e4e427" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-674cf230 elementor-widget elementor-widget-button" data-id="674cf230" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="button.default">
<a class="elementor-button elementor-button-link elementor-size-sm elementor-animation-grow" href="/contact-us">
<span class="elementor-button-content-wrapper">
<span class="elementor-button-text">Get a Free Quote</span>
</span>
</a>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-29e37d33 elementor-widget elementor-widget-button" data-id="29e37d33" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="button.default">
<a class="elementor-button elementor-button-link elementor-size-sm elementor-animation-grow" href="tel:8663707378">
<span class="elementor-button-content-wrapper">
<span class="elementor-button-icon">
<svg aria-hidden="true" class="e-font-icon-svg e-fas-phone-alt" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M497.39 361.8l-112-48a24 24 0 0 0-28 6.9l-49.6 60.6A370.66 370.66 0 0 1 130.6 204.11l60.6-49.6a23.94 23.94 0 0 0 6.9-28l-48-112A24.16 24.16 0 0 0 122.6.61l-104 24A24 24 0 0 0 0 48c0 256.5 207.9 464 464 464a24 24 0 0 0 23.4-18.6l24-104a24.29 24.29 0 0 0-14.01-27.6z"></path></svg> </span>
<span class="elementor-button-text">866-370-7378</span>
</span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="elementor-element elementor-element-75438db e-con-full e-flex e-con e-parent" data-id="75438db" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-60563f2 elementor-widget elementor-widget-template" data-id="60563f2" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="template.default">
<div class="elementor-widget-container">
<div class="elementor-template">
<div data-elementor-type="container" data-elementor-id="224" class="elementor elementor-224" data-elementor-post-type="elementor_library">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1dce223 parent-section e-flex e-con-boxed e-con e-parent" data-id="1dce223" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="e-con-inner">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-35d7ca47 sub-heading elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="35d7ca47" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<div class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">have questions?</div> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-3b05b413 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="3b05b413" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">We’ve got the answers</h2> </div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1f5854cc e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="1f5854cc" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-720259c9 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="720259c9" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-66bb2af5 elementor-widget elementor-widget-n-accordion" data-id="66bb2af5" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;default_state&quot;:&quot;all_collapsed&quot;,&quot;n_accordion_animation_duration&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;ms&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:1,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;max_items_expended&quot;:&quot;one&quot;}" data-widget_type="nested-accordion.default">
<div class="e-n-accordion" aria-label="Accordion. Open links with Enter or Space, close with Escape, and navigate with Arrow Keys">
<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1720" class="e-n-accordion-item" >
<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="1" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1720" >
<span class='e-n-accordion-item-title-header'><h3 class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> What makes Rogue Pest Solutions different from other pest control services in Alabama? </h3></span>
</summary>
<div role="region" aria-labelledby="e-n-accordion-item-1720" class="elementor-element elementor-element-48edefc7 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="48edefc7" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-733a8887 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="733a8887" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Rogue Pest Solutions stands apart through our commitment to environmentally friendly methods, personalized service, and our extensive local expertise in Alabama. Our team’s in-depth knowledge and use of state-of-the-art technology ensure both effective and safe pest control solutions

</div>
</div>
</details>
<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1721" class="e-n-accordion-item" >
<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="2" tabindex="-1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1721" >
<span class='e-n-accordion-item-title-header'><h3 class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> How often should I have my home or business inspected for pests? </h3></span>
</summary>
<div role="region" aria-labelledby="e-n-accordion-item-1721" class="elementor-element elementor-element-a210b8d e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="a210b8d" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-30c64837 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="30c64837" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
We recommend regular pest inspections at least once a year. However, for areas with higher pest activity or for specific concerns like termites, more frequent inspections may be necessary to effectively protect your property.

</div>
</div>
</details>
<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1722" class="e-n-accordion-item" >
<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="3" tabindex="-1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1722" >
<span class='e-n-accordion-item-title-header'><h3 class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> Are Rogue Pest Solutions pest control treatments safe for my pets and children? </h3></span>
</summary>
<div role="region" aria-labelledby="e-n-accordion-item-1722" class="elementor-element elementor-element-439c9b43 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="439c9b43" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2b3e444c elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="2b3e444c" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Absolutely. The safety of your family and pets is our top priority. We use low-toxicity treatments that are effective against pests but pose no harm to humans or animals, ensuring a safe environment for everyone.

</div>
</div>
</details>
<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1723" class="e-n-accordion-item" >
<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="4" tabindex="-1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1723" >
<span class='e-n-accordion-item-title-header'><h3 class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> What are the signs that I might have a termite problem? </h3></span>
</summary>
<div role="region" aria-labelledby="e-n-accordion-item-1723" class="elementor-element elementor-element-73c790b3 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="73c790b3" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-7a0c07ed elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="7a0c07ed" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Signs of a termite problem include visible wood damage, hollow-sounding wood and mud tubes on exterior walls. If you notice any of these signs, it&#8217;s crucial to <a href="https://www.roguepest.com/contact-rogue" target="_blank" rel="noopener">contact us</a> immediately for a thorough inspection and treatment plan.
</div>
</div>
</details>
<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1724" class="e-n-accordion-item" >
<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="5" tabindex="-1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1724" >
<span class='e-n-accordion-item-title-header'><h3 class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> How can I prevent mosquitoes from breeding on my property? </h3></span>
</summary>
<div role="region" aria-labelledby="e-n-accordion-item-1724" class="elementor-element elementor-element-5c20d809 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="5c20d809" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-56e396e0 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="56e396e0" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
To prevent mosquitoes, eliminate standing water sources like clogged gutters, birdbaths, and plant saucers. Regularly treating your property with mosquito control measures is also effective in reducing their population and breeding.

</div>
</div>
</details>
</div>
<script type="application/ld+json">{"@context":"https:\/\/schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[{"@type":"Question","name":"What makes Rogue Pest Solutions different from other pest control services in Alabama?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Rogue Pest Solutions stands apart through our commitment to environmentally friendly methods, personalized service, and our extensive local expertise in Alabama. Our team\u2019s in-depth knowledge and use of state-of-the-art technology ensure both effective and safe pest control solutions"}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How often should I have my home or business inspected for pests?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"We recommend regular pest inspections at least once a year. However, for areas with higher pest activity or for specific concerns like termites, more frequent inspections may be necessary to effectively protect your property."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Are Rogue Pest Solutions pest control treatments safe for my pets and children?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Absolutely. The safety of your family and pets is our top priority. We use low-toxicity treatments that are effective against pests but pose no harm to humans or animals, ensuring a safe environment for everyone."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What are the signs that I might have a termite problem?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Signs of a termite problem include visible wood damage, hollow-sounding wood and mud tubes on exterior walls. If you notice any of these signs, it&#8217;s crucial to\u00a0contact us immediately for a thorough inspection and treatment plan."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How can I prevent mosquitoes from breeding on my property?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"To prevent mosquitoes, eliminate standing water sources like clogged gutters, birdbaths, and plant saucers. Regularly treating your property with mosquito control measures is also effective in reducing their population and breeding."}}]}</script>
</div>
</div>
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-65959689 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="65959689" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-4c9ca447 elementor-widget elementor-widget-n-accordion" data-id="4c9ca447" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;default_state&quot;:&quot;all_collapsed&quot;,&quot;n_accordion_animation_duration&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;ms&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:1,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;max_items_expended&quot;:&quot;one&quot;}" data-widget_type="nested-accordion.default">
<div class="e-n-accordion" aria-label="Accordion. Open links with Enter or Space, close with Escape, and navigate with Arrow Keys">
<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1280" class="e-n-accordion-item" >
<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="1" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1280" >
<span class='e-n-accordion-item-title-header'><h3 class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> What should I do if I find signs of rodent activity in my home? </h3></span>
</summary>
<div role="region" aria-labelledby="e-n-accordion-item-1280" class="elementor-element elementor-element-4619fc79 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="4619fc79" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-74fc1ca3 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="74fc1ca3" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
<p>If you notice signs like droppings, gnaw marks, or unusual pet behavior, it&#8217;s likely you have a rodent problem. <a href="/contact-rogue">Contact us</a> for a comprehensive inspection and customized rodent control strategy to eliminate and prevent future infestations.</p> </div>
</div>
</details>
<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1281" class="e-n-accordion-item" >
<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="2" tabindex="-1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1281" >
<span class='e-n-accordion-item-title-header'><h3 class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> Can Rogue Pest Solution's pest control services help with spider infestations? </h3></span>
</summary>
<div role="region" aria-labelledby="e-n-accordion-item-1281" class="elementor-element elementor-element-55881605 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="55881605" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-3065bc2 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="3065bc2" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Certainly. Our pest control services include effective strategies to manage spider infestations, targeting both the spiders and the insects they feed on, reducing their presence in and around your home or business.

</div>
</div>
</details>
<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1282" class="e-n-accordion-item" >
<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="3" tabindex="-1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1282" >
<span class='e-n-accordion-item-title-header'><h3 class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> What environmentally friendly pest control methods does Rogue Pest Solutions use? </h3></span>
</summary>
<div role="region" aria-labelledby="e-n-accordion-item-1282" class="elementor-element elementor-element-1994951 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="1994951" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-49c4be8d elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="49c4be8d" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
We prioritize eco-friendly methods, including the use of green pesticides, baiting systems, and non-chemical approaches like exclusion techniques, to provide effective pest control while protecting the environment.

</div>
</div>
</details>
<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1283" class="e-n-accordion-item" >
<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="4" tabindex="-1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1283" >
<span class='e-n-accordion-item-title-header'><h3 class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> How quickly can I expect results after a pest control treatment? </h3></span>
</summary>
<div role="region" aria-labelledby="e-n-accordion-item-1283" class="elementor-element elementor-element-7c095e84 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="7c095e84" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-19fd5539 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="19fd5539" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Results can often be seen immediately, but the time frame can vary depending on the type and severity of the infestation. Our team will provide a clear expectation and follow-up plan to ensure effective and lasting pest control.

</div>
</div>
</details>
<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1284" class="e-n-accordion-item" >
<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="5" tabindex="-1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1284" >
<span class='e-n-accordion-item-title-header'><h3 class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> What are the most common pests in Greater Birmingham and throughout Alabama? </h3></span>
</summary>
<div role="region" aria-labelledby="e-n-accordion-item-1284" class="elementor-element elementor-element-43945a1 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="43945a1" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-85f2612 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="85f2612" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
Alabama&#8217;s most common pests include ants, cockroaches, mosquitoes, termites, and rodents. Each of these pests presents unique challenges, and our team is well-equipped to handle the specific pest control needs of the region.
</div>
</div>
</details>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="elementor-element elementor-element-7336f3a e-con-full e-flex e-con e-parent" data-id="7336f3a" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="e-font-icon-svg e-far-clock" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M256 8C119 8 8 119 8 256s111 248 248 248 248-111 248-248S393 8 256 8zm0 448c-110.5 0-200-89.5-200-200S145.5 56 256 56s200 89.5 200 200-89.5 200-200 200zm61.8-104.4l-84.9-61.7c-3.1-2.3-4.9-5.9-4.9-9.7V116c0-6.6 5.4-12 12-12h32c6.6 0 12 5.4 12 12v141.7l66.8 48.6c5.4 3.9 6.5 11.4 2.6 16.8L334.6 349c-3.9 5.3-11.4 6.5-16.8 2.6z"></path></svg> </span>
</div>
<div class="elementor-icon-box-content">

<span >
BUSINESS HOURS </span>
</h3>
<p class="elementor-icon-box-description">
Mon - Sun: 8AM - 9PM </p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<script id="rank-math-json">
var rankMath = {"version":"1.0.270","ajaxurl":"https:\/\/roguepest.savagestrategic.io\/wp-admin\/admin-ajax.php","adminurl":"https:\/\/roguepest.savagestrategic.io\/wp-admin\/admin.php","endpoint":"https:\/\/roguepest.savagestrategic.io\/wp-json\/rankmath\/v1","security":"2a3c9f2c33","restNonce":"36e31e4cb5","modules":{"0":"link-counter","1":"analytics","2":"seo-analysis","3":"sitemap","4":"rich-snippet","10":"content-ai","11":"instant-indexing","12":"local-seo","13":"redirections"},"objectID":2,"objectType":"post"};
</script>
<script>
const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
if( lazyloadBackground ) {
lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
}
lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
}
});
}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
} );
};
const events = [
'DOMContentLoaded',
'elementor/lazyload/observe',
];
events.forEach( ( event ) => {
document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
} );
</script>
<script type="text/template" id="tmpl-elementor-templates-modal__header">
<div class="elementor-templates-modal__header__logo-area"></div>
<div class="elementor-templates-modal__header__menu-area"></div>
<div class="elementor-templates-modal__header__items-area">
<# if ( closeType ) { #>
<button type="button" class="elementor-templates-modal__header__close elementor-templates-modal__header__close--{{{ closeType }}} elementor-templates-modal__header__item" aria-label="Close">
<# if ( 'skip' === closeType ) { #>
<span>Skip</span>
<# } #>
<i class="eicon-close" aria-hidden="true"></i>
<span class="elementor-screen-only">{{{ $e.components?.get( 'document/elements' )?.utils?.getTitleForLibraryClose() }}}</span>
</button>
<# } #>
<div id="elementor-template-library-header-tools"></div>
</div>
</script>

<script type="text/template" id="tmpl-elementor-templates-modal__header__logo">
<span class="elementor-templates-modal__header__logo__icon-wrapper e-logo-wrapper">
<i class="eicon-elementor-circle"></i>
</span>
<span class="elementor-templates-modal__header__logo__title">{{{ title }}}</span>
</script>
<script type="text/template" id="tmpl-elementor-finder">
<div id="elementor-finder__search">
<i class="eicon-search" aria-hidden="true"></i>
<input id="elementor-finder__search__input" placeholder="Type to find anything in Elementor" autocomplete="off">
</div>
<div id="elementor-finder__content"></div>
</script>

<script type="text/template" id="tmpl-elementor-finder-results-container">
<div id="elementor-finder__no-results">No Results Found</div>
<div id="elementor-finder__results"></div>
</script>

<script type="text/template" id="tmpl-elementor-finder__results__category">
<div class="elementor-finder__results__category__title">{{{ title }}}</div>
<div class="elementor-finder__results__category__items"></div>
</script>

<script type="text/template" id="tmpl-elementor-finder__results__item">
<a href="{{ url }}" class="elementor-finder__results__item__link">
<div class="elementor-finder__results__item__icon">
<i class="eicon-{{{ icon }}}" aria-hidden="true"></i>
</div>
<div class="elementor-finder__results__item__title">{{{ title }}}</div>
<# if ( description ) { #>
<div class="elementor-finder__results__item__description">- {{{ description }}}</div>
<# } #>

<# if ( lock ) { #>
<div class="elementor-finder__results__item__badge"><i class="{{{ lock.badge.icon }}}"></i>{{ lock.badge.text }}</div>
<# } #>
</a>
<# if ( actions.length ) { #>
<div class="elementor-finder__results__item__actions">
<# jQuery.each( actions, function() { #>
<a class="elementor-finder__results__item__action elementor-finder__results__item__action--{{ this.name }}" href="{{ this.url }}" target="_blank">
<i class="eicon-{{{ this.icon }}}"></i>
</a>
<# } ); #>
</div>
<# } #>
</script>

<!--
Title: aria-label fixes
Type: elementor_snippet
Author: Hunter
Last edited: 2026-05-26 17:06:43
--- The comment is visible only for administrators ---
-->
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {

document.querySelectorAll('.elementor-social-icon-facebook-f').forEach(function(el) {
el.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Visit Us on Facebook');
});

document.querySelectorAll('.elementor-social-icon-instagram').forEach(function(el) {
el.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Visit Us on Instagram');
});

document.querySelectorAll('.elementor-social-icon-youtube').forEach(function(el) {
el.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Visit Us on YouTube');
});

});

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {

document.querySelectorAll('.elementor-widget-icon').forEach(function(widget) {

// Get aria-label from outer div
const ariaLabel = widget.getAttribute('aria-label');

// Find the anchor tag inside
const link = widget.querySelector('a.elementor-icon');

// Add aria-label to anchor
if (ariaLabel && link) {
link.setAttribute('aria-label', ariaLabel);
}

});

});


document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {

document.querySelectorAll('.clickable-box').forEach(function(box) {

const link = box.getAttribute('data-link');

if (!link) return;

box.style.cursor = 'pointer';

box.addEventListener('click', function(e) {

// Prevent conflict with existing links
if (e.target.closest('a')) return;

window.location.href = link;
});

});

});

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {

document.querySelectorAll('.elementor-loop-container[role="list"]')
.forEach(function(el) {
el.removeAttribute('role');
});

});
</script>

<!-- End of snippet -->

<!--
Title: Google API + Form Updates
Type: elementor_snippet
Author: Hunter
Last edited: 2026-04-07 19:55:17
--- The comment is visible only for administrators ---
-->
<script src="https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/js?key=AIzaSyBW4bXkL222bZrPjwjMmbF4Oa9zN2ErL34&libraries=places"></script>
<script>
(function () {

function initAutocomplete() {
if (typeof google === "undefined") return;

document
.querySelectorAll('input[name="form_fields[location]"]')
.forEach(function (input) {

// Prevent double initialization
if (input.dataset.autocomplete === "true") return;
input.dataset.autocomplete = "true";

const autocomplete = new google.maps.places.Autocomplete(input, {
types: ['geocode']
// componentRestrictions: { country: "us" } // optional
});

autocomplete.addListener('place_changed', function () {
const place = autocomplete.getPlace();
if (place.formatted_address) {
input.value = place.formatted_address;
}
});
});
}

// Initial load
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", initAutocomplete);

// Elementor popup + dynamic content support
document.addEventListener("elementor/popup/show", initAutocomplete);
document.addEventListener("elementor/frontend/init", function () {
setTimeout(initAutocomplete, 500);
});

})();
document.addEventListener('input', function(e) {
const el = e.target;
if (!el || !el.name) return;

// Change these to match your field names/IDs (Elementor typically uses "form_fields[field_id]")
const isPhone = el.name.includes('form_fields[phone_number]');
if (!isPhone) return;

// Keep only digits
let digits = (el.value || '').replace(/\D/g, '');

// If user pasted country code "1" + number, drop leading 1
if (digits.length === 11 && digits.startsWith('1')) digits = digits.slice(1);

// Limit to 10 digits
digits = digits.slice(0, 10);

el.value = digits;

// Find the hidden e164 field in the same form
const form = el.closest('form');
if (!form) return;
const e164 = form.querySelector('input[name*="form_fields[phone_e164]"]');
if (e164) e164.value = digits.length ? (`+1${digits}`) : '';
});

document.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
const form = e.target;
if (!form || form.tagName !== 'FORM') return;

const phone = form.querySelector('input[name*="form_fields[phone_number]"]');
if (!phone) return;

const digits = (phone.value || '').replace(/\D/g, '');
if (digits.length !== 10) {
e.preventDefault();
alert('Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number.');
phone.focus();
}
}, true);
</script>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
document.querySelectorAll('.elementor-form .elementor-field-option').forEach(function (option) {
const checkbox = option.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]');
if (!checkbox) return;

// Prevent double init
if (option.classList.contains('round-init')) return;
option.classList.add('round-init');

// Hide native checkbox visually (keep functional)
checkbox.style.position = 'absolute';
checkbox.style.opacity = '0';
checkbox.style.pointerEvents = 'none';

// Create round UI
const ui = document.createElement('span');
ui.className = 'round-checkbox-ui';
option.insertBefore(ui, option.firstChild);

// Initial state
if (checkbox.checked) ui.classList.add('checked');

// Sync on click
option.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
if (e.target.tagName !== 'INPUT') {
checkbox.checked = !checkbox.checked;
checkbox.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
}
ui.classList.toggle('checked', checkbox.checked);
});
});
});
</script>





<!-- End of snippet -->

<!--
Title: JS
Type: elementor_snippet
Author: Hunter
Last edited: 2026-04-07 19:53:49
--- The comment is visible only for administrators ---
-->
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
const buttons = document.querySelectorAll(".services-btn");
const details = document.querySelectorAll(".services-detail");

// Use your container
const scrollContainer = document.querySelector(".sidebar-nav");

buttons.forEach(button => {
button.addEventListener("click", (e) => {

buttons.forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove("active"));
details.forEach(div => div.classList.remove("active"));

button.classList.add("active");
if (scrollContainer) {
scrollContainer.scrollTo({
left: button.offsetLeft,
behavior: "smooth"
});
}

const link = button.querySelector("a");
if (link) {
const targetSelector = link.getAttribute("href");
const target = document.querySelector(targetSelector);
if (target) {
target.classList.add("active");
}
}
});
});
});


document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {

// First button
const foldBtn = document.querySelector(".fold-btn");
if (foldBtn) {
foldBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
const content = document.querySelector(".content");
if (!content) return;

content.classList.toggle("unfold");

if (content.classList.contains("unfold")) {
this.textContent = "SEE MORE";
} else {
this.textContent = "SEE LESS";
}
});
}

// Second button
const foldBtn1 = document.querySelector(".fold-btn1");
if (foldBtn1) {
foldBtn1.addEventListener("click", function () {
const content = document.querySelector(".content1");
if (!content) return;

content.classList.toggle("unfold1");

if (content.classList.contains("unfold1")) {
this.textContent = "SEE MORE";
} else {
this.textContent = "SEE LESS";
}
});
}

});

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
const offcanvasOpenBtn = document.querySelector('.elementor-offcanvas-toggle');

const offcanvasCloseBtn = document.querySelector('.elementor-offcanvas-close');

if (offcanvasOpenBtn) {
offcanvasOpenBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
document.body.classList.add('offcanvas-open');
});
}
if (offcanvasCloseBtn) {
offcanvasCloseBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
document.body.classList.remove('offcanvas-open');
});
}
});

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
const links = document.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
links.forEach(link => {
const href = link.getAttribute('href');
if (href && !href.includes(window.location.hostname) && !href.startsWith('#') && !href.startsWith('mailto:') && !href.startsWith('tel:')) {
let rel = link.getAttribute('rel') || '';
if (!rel.includes('noopener')) rel += ' noopener';
if (!rel.includes('noreferrer')) rel += ' noreferrer';
link.setAttribute('rel', rel.trim());
}
});
});
</script>



<!-- End of snippet -->

<script defer src="https://static.cloudflareinsights.com/beacon.min.js/v833ccba57c9e4d2798f2e76cebdd09a11778172276447" integrity="sha512-57MDmcccJXYtNnH+ZiBwzC4jb2rvgVCEokYN+L/nLlmO8rfYT/gIpW2A569iJ/3b+0UEasghjuZH/ma3wIs/EQ==" data-cf-beacon='{"version":"2024.11.0","token":"74341323d0a04904a0e13b8d990a70ad","r":1,"server_timing":{"name":{"cfCacheStatus":true,"cfEdge":true,"cfExtPri":true,"cfL4":true,"cfOrigin":true,"cfSpeedBrain":true},"location_startswith":null}}' crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
</body>
</html>
